ksa_text: Skill in evaluating emerging data and AI technologies for strategic relevance, assessing maturity, organizational fit, competitive impact, and integration requirements before recommending investment.

dcwf.top_element_label: Skill in conducting audits or reviews of technical systems.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
Skill in conducting audits or reviews of technical systems.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA LS-S-011 (LS, Skill) does not clear the weak fit inclusion threshold of 0.52. Composite score 0.5042 is insufficient to establish relevance to health informatics, clinical data analysis, and healthcare BI at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (nist_ai_rmf=0.504, eu_ai_act=0.470, ddat=0.438) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude upheld. Score 0.5042 below threshold for weak fit domain; no rescuing analytics text signals. No internal inconsistencies identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does LS-domain KSA LS-S-011 (composite 0.5042) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Composite 0.5042 for LS domain does not meet the evidentiary bar for ANL IC-level inclusion per Leadership competencies in IC-to-senior-IC analytics roles are limited to peer influence and technical mentorship, not organizational strategy. External sources confirm this competency is not a standard expectation for Health Informatics Specialist at the targeted seniority band.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms LS domain KSA at composite 0.5042 is not a standard requirement for Health Informatics Specialist at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: exclude. P2 exclude confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.5042, domain LS, scope weak fit. High confidence.
